reviews.comment:
En esta estación de servicio, si no cargas combustible, no te dejan usar el baño. Se supone que es para el viajero. No siempre necesitas cargar. Pero el baño... QUÉ MALA ATENCION!!! Mal recuerdo de la falda.

(Translated by Google)
At this gas station, if you don't fill up, they won't let you use the restroom. It's supposed to be for travelers. You don't always need to fill up. But the restroom... WHAT TERRIBLE SERVICE!!! Bad memory of the skirt.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtejdXdEVREAE

reviews.comment:
Para tener en cuenta: depende que combustible cargas, debes ingresar x la ruta o por la perpendicular. Servicios y atención correcta

(Translated by Google)
Important information: Depending on the type of fuel you're using, you'll need to enter via the main road or the perpendicular one. Excellent service and attention.

reviews.comment:
Está ubicada en un lugar estratégico en la entrada de Alta Gracia. El servicio de venta de nafta es bueno. No es moderna y sus baños no muy limpios!!!

(Translated by Google)
It's strategically located at the entrance to Alta Gracia. The gas station service is good. It's not modern, and the restrooms aren't very clean!
